一次意外让裴安意外死亡，死后被祖传玉佩带到了斩神世界。
这可是随时会死的世界，就在裴安想着怎么无痛离开这个世界的时候，玉佩中的器灵出现了，成为时空代理人。
裴安:虽然这个能力非常不错，但是还是感觉不太安全，要不我就在空间里呆着得了。
器灵:……你掌握的可是时空法则？这个时间就没人是你的对手，你怕啥，出去干就完了。
裴安:不行不行，还是感觉不安全，我得找找有什么防御的东西。
神级防御法衣？赶紧穿上穿上。
增强速度的鞋子？赶紧穿上穿上。
终于安全一点了，不过怎么感觉脑袋凉凉的呢？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/48f611644e0e09c0d1c5cf63c011a511","author":"卿氿","author_id":"","book_id":"7413696161715866648","book_name":"穿越斩神，我的神明爱收礼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414843013660164632","read_count":"15270","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"492666"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"242","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,同人,搞笑轻松,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0369c3c46ac31ef0e0113f18bc4d81ed~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443581&x-signature=8UTVzP%2BBznjpDGOsQlGpTp3y3yU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3016654817857725","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323175301E4B7A4C4A6321610F5AE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读43分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":54,"forwarde
